pain_points.evidence: Husband runs through these like candy - breaks them, loses them.. etc....
Wish they would develop these in a white color (not just the "inside" version)

pain_points.description: High cost barriers for developers (Apple's $99/year fee)
pain_points.evidence: Apple's $99/year fee + strict review process is a bit of a hurdle for a bootstrapped dev right now.
But it's kinda cheapy feeling plastic and the phone grip is very hard to use/clip.
The fold to open is VERY awkward and doesn't work all of the time. It is also VERY heavy and cheap looking.

pain_points.description: Limited system capacity (10 camera limit per system)
pain_points.evidence: I will say - keep in mind - each of your systems is limited to 10 cameras total.
it does NOT turn off the tab when you close it.... but it turns out this tablet doesn't have this capability

desired_outcomes.description: Long-lasting products that survive frequent use
desired_outcomes.evidence: So I am hoping this one lasts a bit longer than the others.

desired_outcomes.description: No monthly fees for essential services
desired_outcomes.evidence: as long as you have wifi connection, they work well - no monthly fees.

desired_outcomes.description: Portable and compact gear for on-the-go use
desired_outcomes.evidence: I purchased these because I wanted a wired set that would fit into a small bag/box to put in my purse.

desired_outcomes.description: Privacy and consideration for others in shared spaces
desired_outcomes.evidence: I wanted them to use for privacy and consideration of those around me while playing games or viewing videos, etc.

desired_outcomes.description: Easy storage and organization of gear
desired_outcomes.evidence: Comes with a very nice, small holder - perfect for your purse.
as long as you have wifi connection, they work well
I am looking for a lighter, less cheap looking one.

behavioral_insights.description: Prioritize function over form, but still care about aesthetics
behavioral_insights.evidence: To be honest - I purchased these because they are gold colored cords that matched my phone and car... they work great!

behavioral_insights.description: Value bootstrapped, transparent communication from creators
behavioral_insights.evidence: Bro simply said what it is, why he built it and gave us links, no 7 paragraphs about why we should use it.

behavioral_insights.description: Willing to repurchase from trusted brands despite issues
behavioral_insights.evidence: we are firm Blink supporters. We have 2 full systems

behavioral_insights.description: Appreciate minimalism and directness in product pitches
behavioral_insights.evidence: thanks man! I figured people are tired of sales pitches. Just wanted to share the milestone and keep it real.

behavioral_insights.description: Actively research alternatives when products have flaws
behavioral_insights.evidence: I am going to look as some other options.

behavioral_insights.description: Seek community validation and shared experiences
behavioral_insights.evidence: how did you get the first users? ads or word of mouth

behavioral_insights.description: Value no-cost or low-cost acquisition strategies
behavioral_insights.evidence: Zero ads. Just cold outreach to founders (giving them free profiles) and programmatic SEO starting to kick in.
